zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Stratton於1410年出生時，他的父親Augustine de Stratton ESQ36歲，母親Margareth Jenney32歲。他於1436年與Margareth Mosell在英國素福爾可紹特利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1476年10月11日在英國素福爾可紹特利享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴貝。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Stratton于1410年出生时，他的父亲Augustine de Stratton ESQ36岁，母亲Margareth Jenney32岁。他于1436年与Margareth Mosell在英国素福爾可紹特利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1476年10月11日在英国素福爾可紹特利享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可巴貝。

nameMeanings.name: Stratton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Stratton or Stretton, almost all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, Roman road’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. Stratton in Cornwall, which may also be a partial source of the surname, probably has as its first element Cornish stras ‘valley’.

English: variant of Sturton, a habitational name from Sturton le Steeple (Nottinghamshire), Great Sturton (Lincolnshire), Sturton by Stow (Lincolnshire), or possibly Sturton (Northumberland), all of which placenames share the same etymology and early spellings as 1 above.

Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘street, Roman road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Straiton
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, street’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Stratton .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Stratton was born in 1410, his father, Augustine de Stratton ESQ, was 36 and his mother, Margareth Jenney, was 32. He married Margareth Mosell in 1436, in Shotley, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 11 October 1476, in Shotley, Suffolk, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Babergh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Stratton est né en 1410, son père, Augustine de Stratton ESQ, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margareth Jenney, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margareth Mosell en 1436, à Shotley, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 octobre 1476, à Shotley, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Babergh, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Stratton 1410 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Augustine de Stratton ESQ 36 und seine Mutter Margareth Jenney 32. Er hat 1436 in Shotley, Suffolk, England Margareth Mosell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Oktober 1476 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Shotley, Suffolk, England und wurde in Babergh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Stratton è nato il nel 1410, il suo padre, Augustine de Stratton ESQ, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margareth Jenney, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margareth Mosell nel 1436, nel Shotley, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 ottobre 1476, nel Shotley, Suffolk, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Babergh, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Strattonが1410年に生まれた時，父Augustine de Stratton ESQは36歳，母Margareth Jenneyは32歳であった。1436年にイギリススフォルクショトリーでMargareth Mosellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1476年10月11日にイギリススフォルクショトリーで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクババーグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Stratton(이)가 1410년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Augustine de Stratton ESQ(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margareth Jenney(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1436년 영국 수폴크 쇼틀리에서 Margareth Mosell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1476년 10월 11일 영국 수폴크 쇼틀리에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 베이버그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Stratton nasceu em 1410, seu pai, Augustine de Stratton ESQ, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margareth Jenney, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margareth Mosell em 1436, em Shotley, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1476, em Shotley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Babergh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Stratton родился в 1410 г., его отцу по имени Augustine de Stratton ESQ было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margareth Jenney, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margareth Mosell в 1436 г. в местности шотли, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 октября 1476 г. в местности шотли, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности бабирг, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Stratton nació en 1410, su papá, Augustine de Stratton ESQ, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margareth Jenney, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margareth Mosell en 1436, en Shotley, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1476, en Shotley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Babergh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
